title: rhamnus polymorpha var. glabra
intro: Rhamnus polymorpha var. glabra, also known as the smooth buckthorn or glabrous buckthorn, is a plant species within the Rhamnus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the smooth buckthorn is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
